summary: Public release: AGPL-3.0 license, README, version display, CI publishing.

added: Display game version in landing page footer and game HUD top bar.
AGPL-3.0 license file and package metadata.
Project README with tech stack, game systems, and Play now link.
Globe spin GIF in README.
CHANGELOG.json with per-version changes.
Changelog panel modal accessible from landing page and game HUD ("What's new?").
Server API endpoint /api/changelog serving CHANGELOG.json.
changed: Docker images published by GitLab CI only on tag push (:latest and :version).
Hide START NEW GAME button after game creation to avoid confusion with ENTER GAME controls.
fixed: Replace glowing pollution haze shell with toggleable brown smog overlay.
Wrap game-cleanup scheduled task in defineTask.
Sync forest mesh rotation to earth on async load.

summary: UI polish, SEO, favicon, and Docker hardening.

added: SEO meta tags (Open Graph, Twitter cards) with logo.
SVG favicon with orthographic-projected continents.
128x128 transparent logo.png.
Startup cleanup plugin for dev mode scheduled task cleanup.
changed: Remove difficulty levels; scale construction costs by footprint.
Replace facility markers with lines + hover/click; add facility name to detail panel.
Derive MCP URL from request origin instead of env var.
fixed: Facility click now loads facility details via REST endpoint and watcher.
db:clean prunes orphaned registry sessions.
Use npm install in Dockerfile for cross-platform lock compatibility.
Upgrade vue-router to v5 for vue-tsc compatibility.
Install curl in runtime image for healthcheck.
Seed template DB into mounted volume via entrypoint.
Use node:24-slim to match CI build environment.
Resolve TS strict errors in build-favicon.ts.
Remove game session listing from landing page.

summary: IoC container, dead code removal, earth tint fixes.

added: IoC container with dependency injection and modular MCP tools (ADR-0027).
changed: Earth tint only affected by pollution, not forest cover.
fixed: WebGL context leak, tick display, and event feed pagination.
Forest coverage cliff-drop.
Project neural nodes onto continents; remove equator line.
Use world-atlas land-50m for continental outlines (500-point detail).
Remove atmosphere glow from favicon.

summary: Climate-driven forests, facility footprints, eslint compliance.

added: Climate-data-driven forest overlay via Köppen-Geiger.
Location-specific forest grid with dynamic texture updates.
Facility footprint polygons with overlap detection.
3D rendering of facility footprints as filled polygons with glow.
Vector forest points + element sorting by atomic number.
fixed: Forest density texture inversion (DataTexture flipY).
Forest sphere segment resolution (720x360 to match texture).
Prevent left/right panels from rendering under bottom toggle bar.
Research chicken-and-egg problem.
Resolve all eslint errors (52 to 0).
Add pretest/pretypecheck hooks for CI.
Parallel test race condition via registry cache + singleFork.

summary: Tick processing, tech tree, environment, transport, testing.

added: Facility production and transport flow processing per tick.
Facility construction progress advancement per tick.
Tech prerequisite and power validation.
Granular SSE events via in-memory event bus.
GPU particle clouds and transport flow streams (ADR-0008).
Terrain modification visualization on globe.
LOD markers, bloom, moon, pollution overlay, biome tint.
OrbitControls, type-specific marker shapes, clickable facilities.
Real continent coastlines as vector outlines on globe.
Coastline patching on terraform.
Per-facility environmental impact, incidents, logistic population.
Chemistry branch in tech tree with unlocks, costs, recipe gating.
Construction resource consumption and complete lose condition.
Token revoke/mint, cleanup scheduler, last_active_at tracking.
MCP end-to-end flow test (18 cases).
Simulation tests (ADR-0022 layer 4).
Integration tests (ADR-0022 layer 2) + complete recipe seed data.
API and component tests (ADR-0022 layers 3 + 5).
Real MRDS deposits and deterministic terrain grid seeded into template DB.
fixed: Typecheck, build, and runtime errors across scaffold.
Add /api/game/actions route; fix watch.vue broken page import.
Token leak, event_log wiring, and game status gating.
Search tool filters and pagination (ADR-0019).
Close unclosed @layer base block in main.css.
Tailwind, Three.js Vite, SSR route, and Nitro tasks config.
Add /api prefix to MCP URL in buildMcpUrl.
Use official MCP SDK for SSE transport protocol.
TICK display blank, LOD crash, resource overview stubs.
Existing games list uses public token + spectator link.
SSE tick event sends TickState object instead of bare number.
Event feed shape, renewable resources, geographic environment overlay.
Forest fill below coastline lines to remove green border halo.

summary: Initial project scaffold, architecture, and ADRs.

added: Full project scaffold: types, DB schema, domain services, MCP server, web UI, 3D earth, Docker, tests, editor config.
27 Architecture Decision Records (ADRs) covering MCP server, per-game SQLite, terraforming, tech tree, deployment, and more.
Resource model, game loop, lose condition, and geological data sourcing strategy design.
